# clictl Toolbox

> Official tool registry for clictl - the package manager for AI agents. 220+ curated specs for APIs, MCP servers, skills, websites, and CLI tools.

## Spec format

Every spec uses the clictl Tool Spec 1.0 format. Four required fields:

```yaml
spec: "1.0"
name: tool-name
protocol: http          # http, mcp, skill, website, command
description: What this tool does
```

Full reference: https://clictl.dev/spec
JSON Schema: https://clictl.dev/spec/1.0/schema.json

## File structure

- `toolbox/{first-letter}/{tool-name}/{tool-name}.yaml` - All tool specs
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` - How to write a spec (decision tree, examples for each protocol)

## HTTP API spec

```yaml
spec: "1.0"
name: my-api
protocol: http
description: My API tool
version: "1.0"
category: developer
tags: [api, example]

server:
  url: https://api.example.com

auth:
  env: API_KEY
  header: "Authorization: Bearer ${API_KEY}"

actions:
  - name: get-data
    description: Fetch data
    path: /data
    params:
      - name: q
        type: string
        required: true
    transform:
      - extract: "$.data"
      - type: truncate
        max_items: 20
```

## MCP server spec

```yaml
spec: "1.0"
name: my-mcp
protocol: mcp
description: MCP server tool
version: "1.0"
category: developer
tags: [mcp]

package:
  registry: npm
  name: "@org/mcp-server"
  version: 1.0.0

auth:
  env: API_TOKEN

actions:
  - name: search
    description: Search for items
    params:
      - name: query
        type: string
        required: true

deny:
  - "delete_*"

transforms:
  search:
    - type: truncate
      max_items: 20
```

## Skill spec

```yaml
spec: "1.0"
name: my-skill
protocol: skill
description: What this skill does
version: "1.0"
category: developer

source:
  repo: org/repo
  path: skills/my-skill
  files:
    - path: SKILL.md
```

## Website spec

```yaml
spec: "1.0"
name: my-scraper
protocol: website
description: Scrape a site as markdown
version: "1.0"

server:
  url: https://example.com

actions:
  - name: get-page
    description: Get front page
    path: /
    transform:
      - type: html_to_markdown
```

## Command spec

```yaml
spec: "1.0"
name: my-cli
protocol: command
description: Wrap a CLI tool
version: "1.0"

actions:
  - name: status
    description: Show status
    run: my-tool status
```

## Auth format

```yaml
# Header injection
auth:
  env: API_KEY
  header: "Authorization: Bearer ${API_KEY}"

# Query parameter
auth:
  env: API_KEY
  param: key

# MCP env passthrough
auth:
  env: TOKEN
```

## Key rules

- `spec: "1.0"` is required
- `protocol` is required: http, mcp, skill, website, command
- Auth uses header template format: `header: "Name: ${VAR}"`
- MCP tools are discovered at runtime. Actions in the spec are metadata for search.
- No em dashes in any content

## Valid categories

ai, cloud, communication, data, developer, devops, finance, media, monitoring, news, productivity, search, security, weather

## Validation

```bash
clictl toolbox validate
```

## Links

- Spec reference: https://clictl.dev/spec
- Browse tools: https://clictl.dev/browse
- CLI source: https://github.com/clictl/cli
